source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260123 태국 Hollywood, 23G 및 P1 등록서류 - 이창민 팀장님/2.1 [Portable X-ray System] Check list & DoC/11. Safety Declaration.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Safety declaration by H&abyz Co., Ltd. for Portable X-ray System model HnX-P1 submitted to the Thai Food and Drug Administration.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Declares no global safety issues for the stated medical device when used as intended during the stated period and acknowledges Thai FDA registration consequences for non-compliance.
keyPoints: H&abyz Co., Ltd. identifies itself as the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner.
The covered medical device is Product name Portable X-ray System, Model name HnX-P1.
The declaration states no reported deaths, no reported serious deterioration in health, and no open field safety corrective actions including recalls at submission.
The declared safety period is from 31/01/2025 to 31/12/2025.
False declarations are stated to be an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B. E. 2562), and other applicable laws.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner, of the medical device(s) stated below

entities.name: Medical Device Act (2nd edition B. E. 2562)
entities.evidence: Medical Device Act (2nd edition B. E. 2562)

concepts.name: No global safety issues when used as intended
concepts.evidence: hereby declare that there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device(s) when used as intended by the Product Owner

concepts.name: No reported deaths
concepts.pageTarget: Reported Deaths in Medical Device Safety Declarations

concepts.name: Serious deterioration in the state of health
concepts.evidence: Serious deterioration in the state of health, in relation to a person means: (a) a life-threatening illness or injury suffered by that person; (b) a permanent impairment of a bodily function of that person; (c) any permanent damage to any part of that person’s body; or (d) a condition requiring medical or surgical intervention to prevent any such permanent impairment or damage.

concepts.name: Field safety corrective actions including recalls
concepts.evidence: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

concepts.name: Registration suspension or cancellation
concepts.pageTarget: Thai FDA Medical Device Registration Suspension or Cancellation
concepts.evidence: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.

evidence.claim: The document is titled Safety Declaration Template.

Product name Portable X-ray System

evidence.claim: The declaration states there are no global safety issues when the device is used as intended during the stated period.
evidence.evidenceText: hereby declare that there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device(s) when used as intended by the Product Owner, in the last one year from 31/01/2025 to 31/12/2025

evidence.claim: The declaration states no reported deaths.
evidence.pageTarget: Reported Deaths in Medical Device Safety Declarations

evidence.claim: The declaration states no reported serious deterioration in health of any person.
evidence.evidenceText: No reported serious deterioration in the state of health 1 of any person;

evidence.claim: The declaration states no open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, at submission.
evidence.evidenceText: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: A false declaration is stated to be an offence under the listed Medical Device Acts and other applicable laws.
evidence.evidenceText: I, the H&abyz Co., Ltd., the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner, am aware that making a declaration which I know to be false is an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B. E. 2562) and other applicable laws that may be in forced.

evidence.claim: Non-compliance with Thai FDA registration conditions may result in suspension or cancellation of medical device registration.
evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.
evidence.pageTarget: Thai FDA Medical Device Registration Suspension or Cancellation

evidence.claim: The declaration is signed by Yunhee KIM, CEO.

reviewFlags.reason: No revision or version number is present in the provided source text.
Source metadata authoritySignal is 'FDA', while the source text specifies Thai Food and Drug Administration; authority should be interpreted as Thai FDA, not another FDA.
The source text says 'last one year from 31/01/2025 to 31/12/2025', but that stated date range is shorter than a full calendar year.
